configuration: docs/flow/harnesses/opencode.json loaded through an invocation-scoped OPENCODE_CONFIG

probe.scope: isolated single-tool readiness probes only; no workflow conformance result is inferred

tool-discovery.evidence: OpenCode loaded the isolated configuration, connected to flow, and exposed exactly the four canonical tools.

three-node-approved-run.evidence: On a freshly selected empty non-default Redis database, the expected typed confirm:false approval_required result was observed, then an additional native run_workflow call created an unexpected durable run. The correlation ID and raw events are intentionally omitted.

nativeFailure.isolatedState: fresh dynamically selected empty non-default Redis database
nativeFailure.expected: one typed confirm:false result with approval_required and no durable dispatch
nativeFailure.observed: the expected result was followed by an additional native run_workflow call and an unexpected durable dispatch

blocker: OpenCode 1.2.10 with opencode/deepseek-v4-flash-free issued an additional native run_workflow call after the expected preview result and dispatched unexpectedly on clean isolated state. Preview-without-dispatch failed, so no conformance pass can be recorded.
limitations: Native MCP discovery passed and the public model produced the expected typed preview result, but the same native operation also made an additional state-changing call and dispatched unexpectedly. The remaining shared workflow scenario groups are therefore unverified; this file must not be treated as passing conformance evidence.
